case_title: JACOB JUNEAU VS. COWBOY CONSTRUCTION WEST

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAY-09-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY CONSTRUCTION WEST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF APPEARED VIA ZOOM PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG'S ORAL APPROVAL. DEFENDANT APPEARED REPRESENTED BY MERWIN LOPEZ, OWNER, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR ESPINOSA. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JUNEAU, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY CONSTRUCTION WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COWBOY CONSTRUCTION WEST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNEAU, JACOB IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COWBOY CONSTRUCTION WEST I ALLOWED PLAINTIFF JUNEAU TO APPEAR BY ZOOM WITHOUT NOTICE; DEFENDANT AGREED. PLAINTIFF JUNEAU ORALLY STIPULATED TO THE HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
